firstDialogue:
Detective:
(He’s got the same lifeless eyes that the last woman did when she was brainwashed)

Dizzy Man:
They… will know his name

Detective:
(Someone of interest maybe? I need to get more information.)

Dizzy Man:
(This could be a major key to solving the case.)
hintDialogue:
???:
Ugh.. my head. What am I doing out here so late?

Detective Rhythm:
I’m trying to figure out that myself.

Detective Rhythm:
You were brainwashed by someone,

Detective Rhythm:
And I recently encountered someone who was in the same dilemma.

???:
Brainwashed? That’s… How is that even possible?

Detective Rhythm:
I don’t know, but I believe I’m getting closer to finding the culprit.

Detective Rhythm:
What's your name?

Octavio:
Octavio. Octavio Crescendo. And you are?

Detective Rhythm:
Detective Rhythm. I'm trying to solve a recent case of missing people,

Detective Rhythm:
 and you Octavio

Detective Rhythm:
While you were dizzy, you mentioned someone called The Underground Artist.

Detective Rhythm:
Do you recall anything about this person?

Detective Rhythm:
What they look like, what their motive is, anything?

Octavio:
The Underground Artist… Now that I think about it...

Octavio:
I’m starting to remember a little bit about his appearance…

Octavio:
THe’s got green streaks in his hair, wears a white coat, carries around a green boombox I think?...

Detective Rhythm:
That’s great information. Any facial features you can remember?

Octavio:
I’ve… never seen his face actually

Octavio:
He wears some sort of face mask along with shades.

Detective Rhythm:
(Wants to keep his identity a secret it seems)

Detective Rhythm:
(Is there anything else you can tell me?

Detective Rhythm:
The last person I encountered told me that his hideout looked to be somewhere underground.

Detective Rhythm:
Can you attest to this?

Octavio:
I don’t know, I can’t remember what it looked like…

Octavio:
But I do remember it smelling pretty bad, like the worst stench I’ve ever smelt to be honest.

Octavio:
That’s about everything I know.

Detective Rhythm:
Alright, thanks for your help.

Detective Rhythm:
Don’t worry, in due time I’ll have this Underground Artist behind bars.

Octavio:
Thanks, and be careful Detective Rhythm.
